title: S&P launches blockchain fundamentals index for digital assets
summary: The benchmark tracks blockchain networks using protocol revenue, offering an alternative to traditional market capitalization-weighted crypto indexes.

title: Crypto PAC pours $1M into Michigan Democratic primary race
summary: Donavan McKinney, running against Michigan incumbent Shri Thanedar, said that “the crypto lobby is paying my opponent back for helping Trump“ with the PAC-funded ads.

title: Asian Shares Rise as Chipmakers Gain, Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
summary: Asian shares advanced as regional chipmakers gained on expectations they will benefit from billions of dollars flowing into the artificial intelligence buildout. Oil extended its recent gains.

title: Mexican Mayor Shot Dead in his Office After Surviving Earlier Hit
summary: Armed assailants gunned down the mayor of a small Mexican city just south of the country’s capital in his office in the latest case of suspected gangland violence targeting a local official.

title: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
summary: The company's "Everything Exchange" is heading north. No launch date set yet, but the Coinbase Canada CEO says phase two for the company is in motion.

title: Kraken Parent Company Makes Moves to Offer xStocks From Global Markets
summary: Payward and fintech GTN are teaming up to bring xStocks—blockchain-based copies of real company shares—to Hong Kong, the UK, Europe, and South Korea.

summary: Latest Clarity Act draft is drawing praise from the crypto industry and criticism from Democrats and bankers, highlighting deep divisions.

summary: On Wednesday, the Clarity Act took one step closer to becoming law as Republicans released the latest text for the legislation.

title: OpenAI hacking incident exposes mounting risks in AI arms race
